case_title: MARVIN T. RONQUILLO VS. PACIFIC PLACEMENT GROUP AGENCY, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS PACIFIC PLACEMENT GROUP AGENCY, INC., PACIFIC PLACEMENT TEMPORARIES, INC. AND JANE GRONER'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING PLAINTIFF'S APPEARANCE AT DEPOSITION AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PHILIP M. ANDERSEN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302)
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-01-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT'S PACIFIC PLACEMENT GROUP AGENCY, INC., PACIFIC PLACEMENT TEMPORARIES, INC., AND JANE GRONER'S MOTION 1) COMPEL PLTF'S RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION; 2) DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION TO BE ADMITTED; AND 3) FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS - DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL AND THAT REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS, SET ONE, BE DEEMED ADMITTED FOR ALL PURPOSES, IS GRANTED. ALL WRITTEN DISCOVERY SHALL BE PRODUCED BY PLAINTIFF ON OR BEFORE APRIL 10, 2014. A COPY OF THIS ORDER SHALL BE SERVED ON THE ATTORNEY FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY HAND SERVICE OR OVERNIGHT MAIL. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF AND HIS ATTORNEY TO BE PAID WITHIN TWENTY DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER IN THE MAOUNT OF $1355.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-17-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Memo Of P&A Iso Mtn To 1) Compel Pltf'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Requests For Admission; 2) Deem Requests For Admission To Be Admitted; And 3) For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kate Kimberlin of Long & Levit LLP (415-438-4408) appearing for Defendants Pacific Placement.
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING: The Court modified it's tentative ruling and ruled as follows. DEFENDANT PACIFIC PLACEMENT GROUP AGENCY, INC., PACIFIC PLACEMENT TEMPORARIES, INC., JANE GRONER Ntc Of Mtn And Memo Of P&A Iso Mtn To 1) Compel Pltf'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Requests For Admission; 2) Deem Requests For Admission To Be Admitted; And 3) For Monetary Sanctions - Defendant's unopposed motion to compel and that Requests for Admissions, Set One, be deemed admitted for all purposes, is granted. All written discovery shall be produced by plaintiff on or before April 10, 2014. A copy of this Order shall be served on the attorney for the plaintiff by hand service or overnight mail. Sanctions are awarded jointly and severally against the plaintiff and his attorney to be paid within twenty days of the date of this Order in the maount of $1355.00. Order signed in open Court. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Responses To Requests For Production And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KATE KIMBERLIN OF LONG & LEVIT LLP, TEL. NO. 438-4408 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - DEFENDANTs PACIFIC PLACEMENT GROUP AGENCY, INC., PACIFIC PLACEMENT TEMPORARIES, INC. and JANE GRONER's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Requests For Production And For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-tem: Elan C. Lambert, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not Reported. =302/jpt

Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Pltff'S Appearance At Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions`
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Kate Kimberlin, Esq. of Long & Levit LLP, Tel. 415.438.4408, for defendants and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANTS PACIFIC PLACEMENT GROUP AGENCY, INC., PACIFIC PLACEMENT TEMPORARIES, INC. and JANE GRONER'S Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff's Appearance At Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. No opposition was filed. The Court signed the proposed order without modification. Judge Pro Tem: Philip M. Andersen; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2013 Set For Trial On Apr-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
